case_title: JOSUE LUARTE VS. IMPERFECT FOODS, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF LUARTE, JOSUE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JOSUE LUARTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IMPERFECT FOODS, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUARTE, JOSUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IMPERFECT FOODS, INC. CLAIM FAILS TO BE TIMELY FILED GIVEN COURT DATE OF EMPLOYMENT WAS 8.10.20. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40.(WAIVED) SERVED FEB-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IMPERFECT FOODS, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,820.00 FILED BY LUARTE, JOSUE AS TO DEFENDANT IMPERFECT FOODS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2023 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUARTE, JOSUE
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUARTE, JOSUE
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUARTE, JOSUE
ORDER SC-108A(ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT)DENIED**
